database_id.description: Numeric Metabase database ID — sent as `database` in the /api/dataset payload. Take this from the registry entry's metabase source `database_id`.

database_type.description: Database engine (e.g. mariadb, postgres). Copy from the registry entry's metabase source `database_type`. The planner reads docs/metabase_<database_type>_pre_query to pick dialect-specific introspection + optimization rules.

schema.description: Schema name for the queried tables — substituted into the `sql_candidate` `{schema}` placeholder and used to qualify table refs as `schema.table`. Must be a bare SQL identifier (letters/digits/underscore); evidence_gate rejects anything else before execution. Take this from the registry entry's metabase source `schema`.
